diff:
diff --git a/src/pathjoin.py b/src/pathjoin.py
index 1e2ffc2..2bde11e 100644
--- a/src/pathjoin.py
+++ b/src/pathjoin.py
@@ -1,3 +1,13 @@
 def join_segments(segments):
+    if not segments:
+        return ""
+    if segments[0] == "":
+        prefix = "/"
+        segments = segments[1:]
+    else:
+        prefix = ""
     cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments if segment]
-    return "/".join(cleaned)
+    joined = "/".join(cleaned)
+    if prefix and not joined:
+        return "/"
+    return prefix + joined
